summary: Payment system credit-based pricing for 'mumble' language tutor - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend Razorpay integration working correctly, frontend pricing section properly rendered with 3 plans (Free/Plus/Pro), mobile responsive, and all data-testid attributes in place.

pricing_cards.details: All 3 cards found: pricing-card-free, pricing-card-plus, pricing-card-pro

most_popular_badge.details: Badge visible on Plus card with data-testid='pricing-popular-badge'

navbar_pricing_link.details: Pricing link in navbar scrolls to #pricing section

mobile_responsive.details: Cards stack vertically on mobile (390x844), grid-template-columns: 342px

pricing_buttons.details: All buttons found: pricing-btn-free ('Start for Free'), pricing-btn-plus ('Get Plus'), pricing-btn-pro ('Get Pro')

features_verified: GET /api/payments/plans returns all 3 plans with correct prices and credits
GET /api/payments/subscription returns user subscription (defaults to free plan)
POST /api/payments/create-order creates Razorpay order for plus/pro plans
POST /api/payments/create-order rejects free plan with 400 error
Pricing section visible on landing page with 3 cards
Pricing section has correct plan names, prices, and credit amounts
Most Popular badge appears on Plus card
Pricing link in navbar scrolls to pricing section
Landing page pricing cards have proper data-testid attributes
Mobile responsive: pricing cards stack vertically on small screens
critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: payments.py has proper PLANS dictionary with free ($0), plus ($14), pro ($29)
CORRECT: create-order endpoint rejects free plan with 400
CORRECT: Razorpay order uses USD currency with amount in smallest unit (cents * 100)
CORRECT: LandingPage.js PricingSection uses PRICING_PLANS array matching backend
CORRECT: All pricing cards have data-testid attributes (pricing-card-{id}, pricing-btn-{id})
CORRECT: Most Popular badge has data-testid='pricing-popular-badge'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system first iteration complete. Razorpay integration working: /api/payments/plans, /subscription, /create-order endpoints all functional. Frontend pricing section on landing page displays correctly with all 3 plans. Note: Pricing buttons navigate to /chat which redirects to /auth for unauthenticated users. Full Razorpay checkout modal integration planned for internal app pages (not yet wired up on landing page as noted in context).
